batch_objective: Make the Patch Editor functional: a parameter change-list keyed to A2L characteristic names + array indices (e.g. PARAMETER[0] : 23), with value display (decimal/hex/ASCII per A2L data type), saved to and loaded from ASAM CDFX (.cdfx) calibration-exchange files (vCDM-compatible). SCOPE: change-list construction + CDFX read/write/validation only. NOT in scope: applying the change-list to the firmware image, exporting modified S19, undo/redo history.
branch: dev-flow/batch-02-direction-b-restyle (shared working tree - batch-02 + batch-03 accumulating uncommitted; owner to split/commit at a logical point)
batch_layout: Each batch archived under .dev-flow/<YYYY-MM-DD>-batch-NN/. Living docs (REQUIREMENTS.md, tests/, docs/diagrams/) kept current.

living_documentation.requirements: REQUIREMENTS.md (repo root) - R-* traceability updated as behavior lands
living_documentation.tests: tests/ - suite kept green and extended each batch

decisions_log.notes: batch-03 opened after the user reviewed the running batch-02 TUI. Objective: Patch Editor change-list + ASAM CDFX (.cdfx) save/load for vCDM interop. Scope (user-confirmed): change-list + CDFX I/O only (no apply-to-image, no undo/redo). CDFX reference: no client file available - format to be researched from public ASAM CDF sources/schema. This batch DELIBERATELY adds data-processing (CDFX format + change-list model) - distinct from batch-02 which was view-layer-only. NOTE: batch-02 is complete (Phase 6 awaiting-gate) but not yet committed; its final state is snapshotted at .dev-flow/2026-05-20-batch-02/state.json.
Phase 1. architect dispatched to research the ASAM CDF/CDFX format (public schema + sample) and derive US/HLR/LLR; qa-reviewer to follow with the validation strategy.
Synced to vault by /dev-flow-sync-en after PR #6 merge (commit b287c8e).
